discrepancies.summary: R1 grants MEDIUM-HIGH; R2 grants HIGH. Both RATIFY_WITH_AMENDMENT. Divergence is non-substantive: R1 weights the conditional-on-amendment-adoption framing more conservatively; R2 treats the proposed amendment as already-incorporated. Both reviewers cite the same substrate, agree on amendment text, and flag no substrate gaps.
discrepancies.resolution: Most-conservative aggregation applied: operative band is MEDIUM-HIGH. This mirrors M4 V0 cascade 105 → 106 single-synth band exactly; the dual-witness aspect of M7 cascade is structurally stronger than M4 V0 was at the same arc.
